channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canberra Raiders adjust lineup as Hudson Young and Owen Pattie face injury challenges
item.description: The Canberra Raiders have announced lineup changes ahead of their upcoming match against the Wests Tigers, following injuries to key players Hudson Young and Owen Pattie. Young, a crucial forward, and...

item.title: Food Deliveries and Medicine Stalls Support CJP Protesters at Jantar Mantar After Police Crackdown
item.description: The article highlights how Swiggy and Zomato delivery partners, along with citizens, are providing food and medicine to protesters at Jantar Mantar following a police crackdown on the Cockroach Janta ...

item.title: Canadian Premiers Face Pressure from U.S. Trade Tariffs and Alcohol Boycotts During P.E.I. Meeting
item.description: The article details how U.S. President Donald Trump's imposition of 50% tariffs on Canadian goods has intensified pressure on Canadian provincial leaders attending a meeting in Prince Edward Island. T...

item.title: eThekwini Municipality addresses contractor disputes impacting water services
item.description: The eThekwini Municipality has condemned actions by disgruntled contractors who blocked access to municipal water department depots, disrupting essential services. The dispute stems from a revised app...

item.title: Robin Williams' Iconic Role in 'Good Morning, Vietnam' and Its Cinematic Legacy
item.description: Robin Williams' portrayal of DJ Adrian Cronauer in 'Good Morning, Vietnam' (1987) marked a pivotal moment in his career, showcasing his unparalleled comedic talent. Filmed in Bangkok, Thailand, the mo...

item.title: Graduate Unemployment and the Informal Sector Crisis in Tanzania
item.description: A growing number of university graduates in Tanzania are struggling to find formal employment, leading many to take up informal street-based work to survive as the job market tightens. This trend high...

item.title: Royal Caribbean Nigeria launches 2026 Mediterranean cruises for Nigerian travelers
item.description: Royal Caribbean Nigeria has officially launched the Legend of the Seas cruise for the Mediterranean in summer 2026, offering Nigerian travelers a premium holiday experience. The cruise features family...

item.title: Woman seriously injured in high-speed collision during police chase
item.description: A woman has been critically injured in a high-speed collision involving a speeding car and a police pursuit, according to recent reports. The incident occurred on a major highway, where the vehicle re...

item.title: Gauteng Taxi Industry Threatens Shutdown Over Dispute with Transport MEC

item.title: Leyte School Faces Shooting Threat, Authorities Enhance Security Measures
item.description: A public high school in Leyte received an online threat to shoot students and staff on Monday night, prompting immediate action by school authorities. Leyte National High School principal Bayani Adona...

item.title: Vancouver police seize drugs and weapons during trafficking operation

item.title: Delhi High Court declines urgent hearing on plea alleging excessive police force during CJP protest
item.description: The Delhi High Court on Tuesday declined to urgently hear a petition alleging that security personnel used excessive force against protesters during the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) march to Parliament...

item.title: Grade 9 student caught with shabu in Bacolod City
item.description: A Grade 9 student was apprehended for carrying shabu with an estimated street value of P204,000 in Barangay Banago, Bacolod City. The incident occurred when a school security guard conducted a routine...

item.title: News Corp Australia blocks crawler bots with technical restrictions
item.description: News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites, resulting in a message that detects and blocks automated systems. If users encounter this barrier and are no...

item.title: Chery Q electric hatchback set for South African market with R350k starting price
item.description: Chery SA has confirmed the arrival of its new Q electric hatchback in local showrooms by early September. Positioned as the brand's most affordable new energy vehicle in South Africa, the compact hatc...

item.title: DJ Chicken Released On Bail After Legal Proceedings
item.description: DJ Chicken, a controversial Nigerian content creator, has been released from custody after fulfilling bail conditions set by a Lagos Magistrate Court. The release came after he was remanded at Kirikir...

item.title: Ann Widdecombe's fatal attack: Prosecutor details violent assault in court
item.description: Ann Widdecombe, a former Conservative MP and political figure, was subjected to a violent attack at her Devon home on 8 July 2026, according to prosecutors. Joshua Kerry, 28, from Rotherham, is charge...

item.title: Tanzania Boosts Maritime Trade with New Cargo Ships
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has commissioned new cargo vessels to strengthen Tanzania's maritime transport capabilities and enhance regional trade connectivity. The initiative aims to modernize ship...

item.title: Education minister addresses student protests and demands accountability
